name: Basmati Pullao (Cashew & Raisin Pilaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chopped onion over low heat until it becomes tender.
2. Add the cooked rice, cinnamon sticks, cloves, and crumbled bay leaf to the pan.
3. Stir in the toasted cashews and raisins.
4. Cook for 2 minutes, then add 2 cups of water.
5. Cover the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
